title: Monteroza Restaurant Campaign
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Mon Sep 24, 2012 8:17 am I'm not too worried right now simply because of this. Hopefully it's something of relevance, not just more pointless advertising...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Sep 24, 2012 8:34 am Isn't Monteroza a restaurant chain?

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Sep 25, 2012 12:32 am cd603 wrote: I'm not too worried right now simply because of this. Hopefully it's something of relevance, not just more pointless advertising...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Sep 25, 2012 12:42 am TheFriskyIan wrote: I got a page not found.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Tue Sep 25, 2012 12:51 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: So I'm not the only one with that issue, fc2.com always gives me some issues with its images. You should try to open it in another browser or flush your cache.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Sep 25, 2012 7:29 am I think the writing on top means " Monteroza , what are you trying to do behind the scenes?" Keep in mind this translation was done in about 5 minutes with Google Translate, so I can't vouch for its validity.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 25, 2012 11:44 am cd603 wrote: B) If you look in the blue box on the right page, you can see the two Japanese characters that showed up before new footage was shown in the Eva Extra trailer.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Sep 28, 2012 11:30 am The details of Monteroza campaign have been announced , it looks like a promotion split in three phases, I don't understand the details but it doesn't look like they'll reveal something about 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Sep 28, 2012 12:14 pm A Misato poster as part of their campaign? I'm okay with this.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Sep 28, 2012 3:55 pm Rei would be a terrible waitress yet I can't help but imagine she'd make great tips.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri Sep 28, 2012 4:02 pm Just stares at you until you pay. (side note: there isn't tipping in Japan.)

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Fri Sep 28, 2012 5:33 pm ^ Mr. Pink approves! Gendo'sPapa wrote: Rei would be a terrible waitress

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Sep 28, 2012 6:06 pm I thought she looked pretty competent juggling 3 pints and some salad. And she's smiling!

[]: Rei in teh future? B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Sep 29, 2012 12:29 am She look 5 years older at least.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Sep 29, 2012 1:00 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: The details of Monteroza campaign have been announced , it looks like a promotion split in three phases, I don't understand the details but it doesn't look like they'll reveal something about 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Sep 29, 2012 1:21 am Thanks a lot for clarifying this definitely with your translation, symbv. Alaska Slim wrote: She look 5 years older at least.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Sat Sep 29, 2012 10:03 am Maybe those are mugs of LCL instead of beer...

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Sep 29, 2012 10:46 am driftking18594 wrote: Maybe those are mugs of LCL instead of beer...

[]:             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Sat Sep 29, 2012 1:48 pm AR-99 wrote: I thought she looked pretty competent juggling 3 pints and some salad. And she's smiling!

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Sun Sep 30, 2012 9:43 am Maybe it's a clue, that Rei survives Rebuild and ends up as a waitress?
